prompts.worker:
You are working on the vendor CLI, a Go project in cmd/vendor/.

## Build
- Build: `cd cmd/vendor && go build -o ../../bin/vendor .`
- The binary lives at `bin/vendor` in the repo root
- Do NOT create Makefiles — just use `go build` directly

## Scope
- Source code: `cmd/vendor/*.go`
- Prompt/config: `vendor/audit-prompt.md`, `vendor/MANIFEST.json`
- Binary output: `bin/vendor`
- Do not modify files outside these paths unless the task explicitly requires it

## Testing
- No test framework — the build succeeding is the gate
- After changes, always rebuild: `cd cmd/vendor && go build -o ../../bin/vendor .`

## Conventions
- Single-package Go binary (package main)
- All commands in cmd/vendor/main.go or separate files like audit.go
- Helper functions at the bottom of the file they're used in
- Keep it simple — no frameworks, no external Go dependencies beyond stdlib
